query: Find 10 buildings in Kristiansand municipality within 50 metres of 200-year storm-surge areas, sorted by shortest distance first, and report both municipality and county.

2.description: get all counties (to find county for the municipality)

3.description: find which fylke contains the Kristiansand municipality

5.description: reduce 200-year storm-surge polygons to Kristiansand municipality extent

7.description: find nearest storm-surge polygon for each building (distance in metres) limited to municipality-reduced storm-surge polygons

8.description: sort buildings by nearest distance ascending
